_readme: B-deck truth overlay (Track C M6): the parser-derived genesis ledger and lineage chains cross-checked against the captured ATCF best-track snapshots in archive/2026/atcf/. Regenerated by `node tools/bdeck-truth.js` — NEVER hand-edit. The ledger itself is untouched: disagreements are FLAGGED here, never retro-fitted. "no-data" means the b-decks cannot speak to the claim (tag recycled before capture, untagged area) — un-truthable is not wrong.
